nasb.text: It is well with the man who is gracious and lends; He will maintain his cause in judgment.

esv.text: It is well with the man who deals generously and lends; who conducts his affairs with justice.

cnv.text: 恩待人，借貸給別人，按公正處理自己事務的， 這人必享福樂。

ccb.text: 慷慨借贷， 行事公正的人必亨通。

csbs.text: 恩待人、借予人的，是有福之人， 他秉公办事；
